# UC-17.6.12 · Akamai Guardicore Breach Detection Time-to-Containment Metrics (`guardicore:incident`)

## Description

Board-level metrics require measuring how fast segmentation limits damage.

## Value

Drives tabletop improvements and automation investment.

## Implementation

Install the add-on, configure API polling intervals appropriate to API limits, and map assets to CMDB for enrichment lookups.

## SPL

```spl
index=microseg sourcetype="guardicore:incident" earliest=-30d
| where isnotnull(detected_time) AND isnotnull(contained_time)
| eval ttc_sec=contained_time-detected_time
| stats median(ttc_sec) as med_ttc p90(ttc_sec) as p90_ttc by incident_type
```

## CIM SPL

```spl
| tstats `summariesonly` count
  from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic
  by All_Traffic.user, All_Traffic.action, All_Traffic.src, All_Traffic.dest span=1h
| sort - count
```

## Visualization

Box plot (TTC), KPI single values.

## References

- [Splunkbase — Akamai Guardicore Add-on for Splunk](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/7426)
- [Akamai Guardicore documentation](https://www.akamai.com/products/guardicore)
